_schema.description: Lightweight at-home recipe suggestions shown on the FitShield block page.

fields.title: Recipe name (English).
fields.tags: Blocking categories / specialties this recipe suits. 'fallback' marks general-purpose picks.

recipes.title: Black Bean Tacos
recipes.description: Smoky black bean tacos you can build in minutes.
steps: Warm beans with cumin and a pinch of salt.
Heat tortillas in a dry pan.
Fill with beans, cheese, and salsa.
Finish with a squeeze of lime.

recipes.title: Veggie Burrito Bowl
recipes.description: Rice, beans, and veggies in one easy bowl.
steps: Add rice to a bowl as the base.
Top with warmed beans and corn.

recipes.title: Tofu Tacos
recipes.description: Crispy seasoned tofu tucked into warm tortillas.
steps: Crumble and pan-fry tofu until golden.
Stir in taco seasoning with a splash of water.
Fill tortillas and top with cabbage.
Add lime and hot sauce to taste.

recipes.title: Chicken Tacos
recipes.description: Quick seasoned chicken tacos with fresh toppings.
steps: Dice and cook chicken with taco seasoning.
Fill with chicken, onion, and cilantro.

recipes.title: Turkey Taco Bowl
recipes.description: Lean ground turkey over rice with taco fixings.
steps: Brown turkey and stir in taco seasoning.
Top with turkey, corn, and lettuce.

recipes.title: Black Bean Burger
recipes.description: Hearty homemade bean patty on a bun.
steps: Mash beans with breadcrumbs, egg, and onion.
Pan-fry until firm on both sides.
Serve on a bun with lettuce.

recipes.title: Chickpea Burger
recipes.description: Crispy spiced chickpea patties.
steps: Mash chickpeas with flour, garlic, and paprika.
Form patties and pan-fry until golden.

recipes.title: Turkey Burger
recipes.description: Juicy lean turkey burger off the pan.
steps: Season turkey and shape into a patty.
Build with tomato, lettuce, and mustard.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Burger
recipes.description: Simple grilled chicken sandwich.
steps: Layer with lettuce, tomato, and mayo.

recipes.title: Naan Veggie Pizza
recipes.description: Personal pizza on naan, ready fast.

recipes.title: Veggie Pita Pizza
recipes.description: Crispy pita base with melty cheese and veg.
steps: Top the pita with sauce and cheese.

recipes.title: Chicken Flatbread Pizza
recipes.description: Flatbread topped with chicken and cheese.

recipes.title: Protein Smoothie
recipes.description: Cold, filling smoothie in two minutes.

recipes.title: Yogurt Parfait
recipes.description: Layered yogurt, fruit, and crunch.

recipes.title: Homemade Iced Coffee
recipes.description: Cafe-style iced coffee at home.
steps: Stir in sweetener if you like.

recipes.title: Turkey & Avocado Roll-Ups
recipes.description: Savory high-protein bite, no oven needed.
steps: Spread cream cheese on the wrap.

recipes.title: Crispy Chickpea Bowl
recipes.description: Crunchy roasted chickpeas over greens and grains.
steps: Toss chickpeas with oil and paprika.

recipes.title: Baked Chicken Tenders
recipes.description: Crispy oven tenders without the drive-thru.
steps: Dip chicken in egg, then seasoned breadcrumbs.
Bake until golden and cooked through.

recipes.title: Caprese Sandwich
recipes.description: Fresh mozzarella, tomato, and basil on bread.
steps: Slice the bread and layer mozzarella and tomato.

recipes.title: Turkey Sandwich
recipes.description: Classic deli-style turkey sandwich.
steps: Lay out the bread and spread condiments.
Layer turkey, cheese, lettuce, and tomato.

recipes.title: Veggie Rice Bowl
recipes.description: Warm rice bowl loaded with vegetables.
steps: Add rice and a splash of soy sauce.

recipes.title: Lentil Bowl
recipes.description: Protein-packed lentils over grains and greens.
steps: Warm lentils with garlic and a little oil.

recipes.title: Chicken Rice Bowl
recipes.description: Simple seasoned chicken over rice and veg.
steps: Drizzle soy sauce and sesame seeds.

recipes.title: Tuna Wrap
recipes.description: Quick tuna salad rolled in a tortilla.
steps: Mix tuna with yogurt or mayo and celery.
Spread over the tortilla with lettuce.
